title: hypericum fallax
intro: Hypericum fallax, also known as false St. John's Wort, is a flowering plant species in the genus Hypericum. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds that can help soothe wounds and reduce pain. The health benefits of Hypericum fallax include its potential to alleviate symptoms of anxiety and depression, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Hypericum fallax can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and are often used to support mental health and well-being.
